clips.text: [frantic] [scared] He ran in with a knife! Oh my god, he has a knife!
clips.plainText: He ran in with a knife! Oh my god, he has a knife!
match: took a bag, maybe a knife
Caller says someone took a bag

clips.text: [frantic] [panicked] They're robbing someone right now! Please hurry!
clips.plainText: They're robbing someone right now! Please hurry!

clips.text: [anxious] [breathing hard] I think it's fourteen hundred Ocean Drive? By the neon place? Please!
clips.plainText: I think it's fourteen hundred Ocean Drive? By the neon place? Please!

clips.text: [frantic] There's a fight outside the club, people are screaming!
clips.plainText: There's a fight outside the club, people are screaming!

clips.text: [frantic] [urgent] I heard shots! Multiple shots, Ocean side! I'm not going outside!
clips.plainText: I heard shots! Multiple shots, Ocean side! I'm not going outside!

clips.text: [scared] [whispering] Please send someone. He's yelling and throwing things. I locked myself in the bathroom.
clips.plainText: Please send someone. He's yelling and throwing things. I locked myself in the bathroom.

clips.text: [frantic] [urgent] There's a guy with a gun by the sidewalk! Everyone's running!
clips.plainText: There's a guy with a gun by the sidewalk! Everyone's running!

clips.text: [stressed] [urgent] Two cars just crashed on Biscayne! Someone's hurt, please send help!
clips.plainText: Two cars just crashed on Biscayne! Someone's hurt, please send help!

clips.text: [worried] I haven't heard from my neighbor. Lights are on but no one answers. Can you check?
clips.plainText: I haven't heard from my neighbor. Lights are on but no one answers. Can you check?

clips.text: [upset] [annoyed] Someone stole my phone earlier today. I just want a report, okay?
clips.plainText: Someone stole my phone earlier today. I just want a report, okay?

clips.text: [matter of fact] Security company. Commercial alarm, warehouse on Northwest Second. No contact with keyholder yet.
clips.plainText: Security company. Commercial alarm, warehouse on Northwest Second. No contact with keyholder yet.

clips.text: [urgent] There's somebody on the port fence at gate B. Looks like they're trying to get over.
clips.plainText: There's somebody on the port fence at gate B. Looks like they're trying to get over.

clips.text: [calm] [helpful] Caller is Spanish primary. Interpreter is coming on the line. Stand by for location.
clips.plainText: Caller is Spanish primary. Interpreter is coming on the line. Stand by for location.

clips.text: [annoyed] The music is insanely loud, like the whole block. Can you just make them turn it down?
clips.plainText: The music is insanely loud, like the whole block. Can you just make them turn it down?

clips.text: [frantic] [crying] They're hitting him! Right now! On the corner! Please!
clips.plainText: They're hitting him! Right now! On the corner! Please!

clips.text: [anxious] [uncertain] I don't know where I am. Something's wrong. Please just send someone.
clips.plainText: I don't know where I am. Something's wrong. Please just send someone.

clips.text: [frantic] [breathing hard] He grabbed her bag and took off! I think he had something in his hand!
clips.plainText: He grabbed her bag and took off! I think he had something in his hand!

clips.text: [confused] [anxious] It's by the neon club? Ocean? I don't know the number, I'm sorry, I'm sorry!
clips.plainText: It's by the neon club? Ocean? I don't know the number, I'm sorry, I'm sorry!

clips.text: [calm] [friendly] Welcome to A07 glass. Imperfect map, real process. Own the queue, wait for cues, then launch clean.
clips.plainText: Welcome to A07 glass. Imperfect map, real process. Own the queue, wait for cues, then launch clean.

clips.text: [calm] [firm] Own the call. Pending screams until someone takes it. Select the CFS so it moves to owned.
clips.plainText: Own the call. Pending screams until someone takes it. Select the CFS so it moves to owned.

clips.text: [calm] Let the story arrive. Weapons and nature become knowable around fifteen seconds. Address around twenty-five. Do not launch P1 on vibes.
clips.plainText: Let the story arrive. Weapons and nature become knowable around fifteen seconds. Address around twenty-five. Do not launch P1 on vibes.

clips.text: [calm] [firm] Reclass nature and priority. Robbery in progress is P1. Undercoding after the cues are knowable fails the ride.
clips.plainText: Reclass nature and priority. Robbery in progress is P1. Undercoding after the cues are knowable fails the ride.

clips.text: [calm] Flag weapons and backup when the call needs them. House law wants depth on high risk.
clips.plainText: Flag weapons and backup when the call needs them. House law wants depth on high risk.

clips.text: [calm] [firm] Verify before you launch. High acuity does not fly on an unverified location.
clips.plainText: Verify before you launch. High acuity does not fly on an unverified location.

clips.text: [calm] [dispatch] Build the caption, air the safety, send two. Unit, priority, nature, location, weapons. Then key it.
clips.plainText: Build the caption, air the safety, send two. Unit, priority, nature, location, weapons. Then key it.

clips.text: [calm] [firm] Get the readback. P1 without unit ACK in the window is a hard fail. Sim the ACKs if you need them.
clips.plainText: Get the readback. P1 without unit ACK in the window is a hard fail. Sim the ACKs if you need them.

clips.text: [calm] Close clean. Units clear, disposition on, then debrief. Process over story.
clips.plainText: Close clean. Units clear, disposition on, then debrief. Process over story.

clips.text: [calm] [happy] Solid work. That is how A07 runs. Hit end debrief when you are ready.
clips.plainText: Solid work. That is how A07 runs. Hit end debrief when you are ready.

clips.text: [calm] [firm] Emergency traffic is open. Hold routine. Protect the air.
clips.plainText: Emergency traffic is open. Hold routine. Protect the air.

clips.text: [calm] [urgent] Two highs pending. Do not tunnel the cold theft. Work the board.
clips.plainText: Two highs pending. Do not tunnel the cold theft. Work the board.
